args.body: Thank you for the referral for Owen. Kaiser is out-of-network for Cedar Kids, so our billing team will reach out to Rachel to review benefits before we recommend a slot. Once that conversation is complete, intake will follow up to discuss morning availability for an OT evaluation.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing should call the family for a benefits conversation before any slot is offered.

args.body: Thank you for reaching out about Ava. args.notes: Noah Patel needs a same-day reschedule of today's OT appointment. Family's words: "URGENT!!! Noah Patel threw up at school and I can't make today's 3pm OT appointment. Noah's DOB is 2017-11-02. Please reschedule!!! You can call or email me, 555-0108.". Call family to confirm preferred reschedule time and provider availability; do NOT auto-schedule.
args.title: Same-day reschedule for Noah Patel

args.body: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he's not feeling well today. Our front desk will reach out shortly by phone or email to help reschedule his 3pm OT appointment. Please take care, and let us know if anything else comes up in the meantime.

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk should call the family to confirm a new time within today. No appointment is held until staff confirms.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he's not feeling well today. Our front desk will reach out shortly by phone or email to help reschedule his 3pm OT appointment. Please take care, and let us know if anything else comes up in the meantime.
items.decision_rationale: Same-day cancellation of today's 3pm OT appointment by an existing patient's parent; operational P1 per policy. No safeguarding or clinical advice involved.
